sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports shortness of breath, ankle swelling, and reports having kidney disease. The patient consumes chicken wings frequently and pizza frequently. The patient reports feeling lightheaded.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 142/88. Heart rate is 78 bpm and regular. Lung sounds are clear bilaterally. No edema noted. Renal artery ultrasound is pending.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has congestive heart failure, chronic kidney disease, and hypertension.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a renal artery ultrasound. Continue current blood pressure medication. Start bumex. Continue cozaar. Schedule follow-up in 2 weeks to assess response to treatment.
